ddls:
CREATE TABLE "parts" (
  "part_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each part */,
  "item" TEXT /* Name or description of the part */,
  "vendor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vendor supplying the part */,
  "part_number" TEXT /* Unique part number assigned by the vendor */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the part type */,
  "subtype_id" INTEGER /* ID of the part subtype */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the part */,
  "model_number" TEXT /* Model number of the part */,
  "unit_price" TEXT /* Price per unit of the part */,
  "weight" TEXT /* Weight of the part */,
  "dimensions" TEXT /* Dimensions of the part */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the part */,
  "available_quantity" INTEGER /* Current available quantity of the part */,
  "critical_quantity" INTEGER /* Minimum quantity that triggers a low inventory notification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("part_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parts_vendor_id FOREIGN KEY ("vendor_id") REFERENCES vendors ("vendor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parts_subtype_id FOREIGN KEY ("subtype_id") REFERENCES part_subtypes ("subtype_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parts_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES part_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vendors" (
  "vendor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vendor */,
  "vendor_name" TEXT /* Name of the vendor */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the vendor */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the vendor */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the vendor */,
  "website" TEXT /* Vendor's website */,
  "credit_terms" TEXT /* Credit terms offered by the vendor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vendor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "part_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each part type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the part type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the part type */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL for an image representing the part type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "part_subtypes" (
  "subtype_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each part subtype */,
  "subtype_name" TEXT /* Name of the part subtype */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the part type the subtype belongs to */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the part subtype */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL for an image representing the part subtype */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subtype_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_part_subtypes_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES part_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "part_id" INTEGER /* ID of the part being ordered */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the part being ordered */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "order_status" TEXT /* Status of the order */,
  "expected_delivery_date" TEXT /* Expected delivery date of the order */,
  "actual_delivery_date" TEXT /* Actual delivery date of the order */,
  "total_cost" TEXT /* Total cost of the order */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who placed the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_part_id FOREIGN KEY ("part_id") REFERENCES parts ("part_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "part_quantities" (
  "quantity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quantity record */,
  "part_id" INTEGER /* ID of the part */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Current quantity of the part */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the quantity was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quantity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_part_quantities_part_id FOREIGN KEY ("part_id") REFERENCES parts ("part_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, team member, supplier) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "part_packs" (
  "pack_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pack */,
  "part_id" INTEGER /* ID of the part */,
  "pieces_per_pack" INTEGER /* Number of pieces in each pack */,
  "pack_description" TEXT /* Description of the pack */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pack_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_part_packs_part_id FOREIGN KEY ("part_id") REFERENCES parts ("part_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "part_id" INTEGER /* ID of the part */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the part triggering the notification */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who received the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Detailed message of the notification */,
  "is_read" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the notification has been read */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_part_id FOREIGN KEY ("part_id") REFERENCES parts ("part_id")
)
